title: Samsung Presents Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and Watch 9
description: Samsung has presented the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and Galaxy Watch 9. Reports indicate new features like Snapdragon processors and IP69K ratings.

sources.title: Samsung lança Galaxy Watch 9 e Ultra 2 com Snapdragon, IP69K e mais bateria; veja os preços
Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra2 e Watch9: seu aliado de saúde no pulso
Galaxy Watch 9 e Watch Ultra 2 são apresentados pela Samsung

sections.heading: Product Launch
paragraphs: Samsung has presented the Galaxy Watch 9 and the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2, according to Tecnoblog and the Samsung Global Newsroom.

sections.heading: Technical Specifications
paragraphs: TudoCelular reports that the new models come equipped with Snapdragon processors. Additionally, the source mentions an IP69K rating and increased battery life for the devices.

sections.heading: Health Focus
paragraphs: The Samsung Global Newsroom refers to the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 and Watch 9 as a health ally on the wrist.

faq.q: What new devices did Samsung announce?
faq.a: According to Tecnoblog and Samsung Global Newsroom, Samsung presented the Galaxy Watch 9 and the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.

faq.q: What features are reported for the new watches?
faq.a: TudoCelular reports that the watches feature Snapdragon processors, an IP69K rating, and more battery.
